name: Cloudflare - Revoke Zero Trust Access on High IoC
description: When SentinelOne detects a high-severity Indicator of Compromise (IOC) or Ransomware, this workflow orchestrates a complex response. It calls the Cloudflare Zero Trust API to revoke active user sessions immediately. This forces re-authentication (potentially with stricter MFA) across all apps, locking the user out regardless of the device they are using.
